tasks.description: Run automated security and quality scans: SAST scan, dependency vulnerability audit (pkg_audit), secret scanning (secretscan), and license/SBOM generation across the entire src/ directory
tasks.acceptance: All automated scans complete with findings documented. No scan crashes or failures.

tasks.description: Verify project builds, type-checks, and lints cleanly. Run npm run build, npm run type-check, npm run lint. If any pass with warnings, document the warnings. If any fail, document the exact errors.
tasks.acceptance: Build, type-check, and lint statuses recorded. Any failures documented with exact output.

tasks.description: Run all 14 existing tests and record pass/fail per test file. Document any pre-existing test failures.
tasks.acceptance: All test results recorded. Any failures documented with error output.

tasks.description: Analyze database schema (src/types/database.ts, 1050 lines) against CLAUDE.md and supabase/migrations for drift: missing tables, extra tables, missing columns, and RLS policy mismatches.
tasks.acceptance: Schema drift report generated: all 16 tables, RLS policies, and 7 RPC functions verified against spec.

tasks.description: Audit authentication flows: review src/app/api/auth/create-child/route.ts (238 lines, child account creation), signup-gm, signin-player, signout, update-password, lookup-username. Verify error messages don't leak user existence, session tokens are handled correctly, and generated email pattern (@household-id.questforge.local) is consistent.
tasks.acceptance: Auth flow audit complete. All 7 auth API routes reviewed. Any leaking error messages, session handling bugs, or email pattern inconsistencies documented.

tasks.description: Audit middleware (src/middleware.ts, 65 lines) and route protection. Verify /dashboard is GM-only, /play is player-only, login/signup redirect authenticated users correctly, forgot-password/reset-password flow is unbroken, and public routes are accessible without auth.
tasks.acceptance: Middleware logic verified. Role-based gating, redirect paths, and edge cases documented.

tasks.description: Audit multi-tenant data isolation: verify every API route and hook includes household_id filter in Supabase queries. Review RLS policy coverage across all 16 tables. Check that service-role-bypass paths (admin.ts) manually filter by household_id.
tasks.acceptance: RLS audit complete. Every table's RLS policy verified. Every API route's query patterns checked for household_id. Findings documented.

tasks.description: Audit API security middleware: review src/lib/api/middleware.ts (rate-limiter, CSRF, body-limit, sanitize) and verify all 22 API routes apply the composite middleware. Check rate-limiter configuration (src/lib/api/rate-limiter.ts, in-memory), CSRF token validation, and input sanitization completeness.
tasks.acceptance: API security middleware audit complete. All 22 routes' middleware composition verified. Rate limiter, CSRF, body-limit, and sanitize coverage gaps documented.

tasks.description: Audit secrets management: search entire codebase for hardcoded secrets, verify SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is only in src/lib/supabase/admin.ts and never imported client-side, check .env.local is in .gitignore, verify NEXT_PUBLIC_ env vars don't expose server-side keys.
tasks.acceptance: Secrets audit complete. No hardcoded secrets found. Service role key isolation verified. Any exposure risks documented.

tasks.description: Audit error boundaries: verify every route directory in src/app/ has an error.tsx. Check error.tsx files handle different error types (auth errors, network errors, Supabase errors, rendering errors). Verify error boundaries don't leak stack traces to users.
tasks.acceptance: Error boundary coverage audit complete. Missing boundaries documented. Error handling quality assessed.

tasks.description: Audit loading states: verify every async-loading route has a loading.tsx. Check that hooks handle loading/error/empty states correctly. Review all 10 hooks for missing error handling in subscription callbacks.
tasks.acceptance: Loading state audit complete. Missing skeletons, flash-of-loading, and hook error handling gaps documented.

tasks.description: Audit responsive design and accessibility: verify Tailwind breakpoint usage (375px mobile, 768px tablet, 1024px desktop), 48px minimum touch targets on interactive elements, gender-neutral UI language ('your child' not 'son/daughter'), and image-rendering:pixelated on all sprite elements.
tasks.acceptance: Responsive and accessibility audit complete. Breakpoint violations, undersized touch targets, and gendered language documented.

tasks.description: Audit Canvas sprite rendering: review src/lib/sprites/compositor.ts (complexity 99, highest in codebase), palette.ts, particles.ts, proceduralBosses.tsx. Check integer-only scaling, tinting fallback logic, layer ordering, memory cleanup on unmount, missing asset fallback, and CSS image-rendering directive.
tasks.acceptance: Sprite rendering audit complete. Canvas memory leaks, tinting failures, scaling issues, and missing fallbacks documented.

tasks.description: Audit audio system: review src/lib/audio.ts (complexity 80, 4th highest) and src/store/useAudioStore.ts. Verify iOS autoplay compliance (user-gesture-initiated playback), graceful failure on missing audio files, Howler.js instance cleanup on unmount, and concurrent SFX/BGM management.
tasks.acceptance: Audio system audit complete. Autoplay, cleanup, and error handling gaps documented.

tasks.description: Audit state management: review src/store/useQuestStore.ts (288 lines, 10+ actions) and src/lib/auth-context.tsx for stale closures, Realtime subscription cleanup, race conditions in concurrent state updates, and Zustand subscriber leaks on component unmount.
tasks.acceptance: State management audit complete. Race conditions, subscription leaks, and stale closure risks documented.

tasks.description: Audit all 8 academy mini-games (MathArena complexity 49, WordForge 23, ScienceLabyrinth 17, BattleArena 26, HistoryScroll, VocabDuel, LogicGate, GeneralKnowledge, LifeSkills). Verify score calculation, age-tier routing (junior/senior), timer handling, answer validation, and reward payout logic.
tasks.acceptance: All 8 academy games audited. Score, timer, tier routing, and reward correctness documented.

tasks.description: Audit boss battle mechanics: review src/lib/boss.ts, src/hooks/useBoss.ts, and src/store/useQuestStore.ts for HP scaling formula (0.5 + 0.5 × player_count), cooperative damage accounting, carry-over HP for undefeated bosses, and correct bonus rewards on defeat.
tasks.acceptance: Boss battle mechanics audit complete. Scaling formula, cooperative damage, and carry-over logic verified.

tasks.description: Audit story progression system: review src/hooks/useStory.ts, src/lib/ai/story.ts, src/lib/story/seed-chapters.ts, and the story API routes. Verify chapter unlock thresholds, personalized story generation per household, gender-neutral narrative language, and pre-written fallback scaffolds.
tasks.acceptance: Story system audit complete. Chapter progression, personalization, and fallback logic verified.

tasks.description: Audit AI integration resilience: review src/lib/ai/client.ts (242 lines, OpenRouter client), edu.ts, flavor.ts, rate-limiter.ts. Verify stripThinking() handles all 6+ thinking tag variants, model fallback chain (primary → fallback → cache), rate-limit enforcement against api_usage table, graceful timeout (25s), and fallback content loading when AI is unavailable.
tasks.acceptance: AI integration audit complete. All failure modes, fallback paths, and rate-limit behaviors documented.

tasks.description: Audit XP/gold/leveling calculations: verify src/lib/xp.ts formulas (level N requires 50 × N × (N+1) / 2 total XP), dual-tracked XP (xp_total vs xp_available), purchase deduction logic, and level-up triggers.
tasks.acceptance: XP and economy audit complete. Formulas, dual-tracked XP, and purchase deductions verified.

tasks.description: Compile all findings from Phases 1-4 into a prioritized audit report organized by severity (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO). Each finding includes: affected file/component, description, reproduction steps, impact assessment, and suggested fix direction.
tasks.acceptance: Consolidated audit report written to .swarm/evidence/audit-report/findings.json with all findings categorized and prioritized.

tasks.description: Document test coverage gaps: analyze which modules lack tests (hooks, stores, AI, game components, dashboard pages, sprite compositor). Identify modules with highest risk from missing coverage.
tasks.acceptance: Coverage gap report appended to audit findings. Modules ranked by risk from missing tests.

tasks.description: Write audit retrospective: record phase metrics, total files reviewed, findings by severity, top defect categories, and lessons learned for future audits.
tasks.acceptance: Audit retrospective written to .swarm/evidence/audit-report/retrospective.json.

tasks.description: Run automated security and quality scans: SAST scan, dependency vulnerability audit (pkg_audit), secret scanning (secretscan), and license/SBOM generation across the entire src/ directory

approval.summary: Phase 1 Full Application Audit completed. Audit deliverable matches spec: 13 findings documented across all specified areas (auth, security, database, frontend, games, AI, build, tests). Findings correctly identify real drifts between the current codebase state and the spec requirements — this is the expected output of an audit phase. The audit itself has zero implementation drift from its spec.

Verify score calculation, age-tier routing (junior/senior), timer handling, answer validation, and reward payout logic.
tasks.acceptance: All 8 academy games audited. Score, timer, tier routing, and reward correctness documented.

tasks.description: Audit boss battle mechanics: review src/lib/boss.ts, src/hooks/useBoss.ts, and src/store/useQuestStore.ts for HP scaling formula (0.5 + 0.5 × player_count), cooperative damage accounting, carry-over HP for undefeated bosses, and correct bonus rewards on defeat.
tasks.acceptance: Boss battle mechanics audit complete. Scaling formula, cooperative damage, and carry-over logic verified.

tasks.description: Audit story progression system: review src/hooks/useStory.ts, src/lib/ai/story.ts, src/lib/story/seed-chapters.ts, and the story API routes. Verify chapter unlock thresholds, personalized story generation per household, gender-neutral narrative language, and pre-written fallback scaffolds.
tasks.acceptance: Story system audit complete. Chapter progression, personalization, and fallback logic verified.

tasks.description: Audit AI integration resilience: review src/lib/ai/client.ts (242 lines, OpenRouter client), edu.ts, flavor.ts, rate-limiter.ts. Verify stripThinking() handles all 6+ thinking tag variants, model fallback chain (primary → fallback → cache), rate-limit enforcement against api_usage table, graceful timeout (25s), and fallback content loading when AI is unavailable.
tasks.acceptance: AI integration audit complete. All failure modes, fallback paths, and rate-limit behaviors documented.

tasks.description: Audit XP/gold/leveling calculations: verify src/lib/xp.ts formulas (level N requires 50 × N × (N+1) / 2 total XP), dual-tracked XP (xp_total vs xp_available), purchase deduction logic, and level-up triggers.
tasks.acceptance: XP and economy audit complete. Formulas, dual-tracked XP, and purchase deductions verified.

tasks.description: Compile all findings from Phases 1-4 into a prioritized audit report organized by severity (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO). Each finding includes: affected file/component, description, reproduction steps, impact assessment, and suggested fix direction.
tasks.acceptance: Consolidated audit report written to .swarm/evidence/audit-report/findings.json with all findings categorized and prioritized.

tasks.description: Document test coverage gaps: analyze which modules lack tests (hooks, stores, AI, game components, dashboard pages, sprite compositor). Identify modules with highest risk from missing coverage.
tasks.acceptance: Coverage gap report appended to audit findings. Modules ranked by risk from missing tests.

tasks.description: Write audit retrospective: record phase metrics, total files reviewed, findings by severity, top defect categories, and lessons learned for future audits.
tasks.acceptance: Audit retrospective written to .swarm/evidence/audit-report/retrospective.json.

tasks.description: Run automated security and quality scans: SAST scan, dependency vulnerability audit (pkg_audit), secret scanning (secretscan), and license/SBOM generation across the entire src/ directory
tasks.acceptance: All automated scans complete with findings documented. No scan crashes or failures.

tasks.description: Verify project builds, type-checks, and lints cleanly. Run npm run build, npm run type-check, npm run lint
tasks.acceptance: Build, type-check, and lint statuses recorded.

tasks.description: Run all 14 existing tests and record pass/fail per test file
tasks.acceptance: All test results recorded.

tasks.acceptance: Schema drift report generated.
